content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run an Engineering discovery session for your OTC line. New line or retrofit?
New dedicated OTC line in our existing FDA-registered facility.
ISO 8 filling area. Temperature 20-22°C, RH 45-55%. Full HEPA filtration.
Full IQ/OQ/PQ per 21 CFR 211. Process validation on first three commercial batches.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
